turns.user_message: We used to fall into step so easily, like we shared the exact same rhythm without even trying. Lately, every interaction feels like I am walking on a completely different path. I try to match their pace, but my steps just keep missing the mark. It leaves me feeling completely out of sync and quietly exhausted by the end of the day. I keep hoping it is just a rough patch, but the silence between us keeps stretching longer than I expected.

I keep noticing how the easy laughter we used to trade has turned into careful, measured replies. Every time I bring up something that matters to me, the conversation just stalls out. I find myself holding back my real thoughts because I can already predict how the mood will shift. This pattern has been repeating for months, and it makes me feel like a guest in my own space. I just want to go back to the effortless connection we had before everything got so heavy.

I honestly do not recognize the distance between us anymore, especially when I remember how close we used to be. It feels like I am constantly reaching across a widening gap that just keeps pulling us further apart. I try to bridge it, but my words just bounce off and leave me feeling completely hollow. The weight of this disconnect sits heavy in my chest, making every shared moment feel like a quiet struggle. I miss the version of us that actually understood each other without needing to explain a single thing.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be.
